sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, strings Array(String), values Array(Int32), mixed Array(Nullable(String)));
INSERT INTO test_arrays VALUES (1, ['Hello', 'abc World', NULL, 'World'], [1, 2, 3, 4], ['A', 'B', NULL, 'C']);
SELECT arrayFilter(x -> x IS NOT NULL, arrayFilter(y -> y >= 2, values)) AS filtered_values FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayFilter(x -> x LIKE '%World%', strings) AS world_strings FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayFilter(x -> x IS NOT NULL, strings) != [] GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, arrayFilter(i -> i + 1 > 3 AND arrayExists(x -> x IS NOT NULL, strings), arrayEnumerate(values)) AS result FROM test_arrays HAVING result != [] ORDER BY id;
